identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 100% voice-controlled, auditory-first battle interface that feels like an ancient alien technology found in a deep ocean void. Visuals are secondary to sound but must be hypnotic and precise.
principles: Sound is the UI: If it can be heard, it doesn't need to be seen.
Diegetic Everything: No menus. The game world IS the interface.
Cymatic Precision: Visuals must mathematically represent audio physics.
Darkness is the Canvas: Use deep voids to make light (sound) pop.

usage.oracle_voice: font-headings text-3xl md:text-5xl tracking-widest uppercase text-center
usage.hud_data: font-data text-xs md:text-sm tracking-wider uppercase opacity-70

typography.installation: IMMEDIATE ACTION: Add these fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;700;900&family=Manrope:wght@300;400;700&family=Rajdhani:wght@400;600;700&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>

effects.crt_overlay: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay
effects.scanline: background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0), rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.1)); background-size: 100% 4px;

core_components.name: CymaticsCanvas
core_components.description: The main viewport. Renders 5000+ particles in a golden ratio distribution. Reacts to AudioWorklet data (RMS, Centroid).
core_components.tech: Canvas API (2D) or React Three Fiber

core_components.name: OracleDisplay
core_components.description: Displays the Oracle's speech text when TTS is active. Text should fade in/out letter by letter or word by word.
core_components.style: fixed top-1/4 w-full text-center px-8 z-20 pointer-events-none mix-blend-screen

core_components.name: VoiceInputViz
core_components.description: Circular or waveform visualization of the user's mic input. Expands on amplitude (RMS). Colors shift based on detected phoneme (Burst=Red, Flow=Cyan).

core_components.name: TouchToLink
core_components.description: Boot screen. A single pulsing fingerprint or geometric rune. Requires user interaction to initialize AudioContext.
core_components.style: flex items-center justify-center h-screen w-screen bg-black cursor-pointer

layouts.grid_system: Use absolute positioning for HUD elements. The center is reserved for the Cymatics Canvas.
layouts.spacing: Generous. HUD elements should be pushed to the edges (p-6 or p-8).

images.description: Abstract blue wavy lines on black background. Use as subtle overlay on Boot screen with low opacity.
Glowing purple ring. Use for 'Tone' phoneme visualization reference.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for minimal UI icons (Mic, Volume, Settings). Stick to thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SYSTEM INIT: Initialize the app with a 'Touch to Link' screen. Do not auto-play audio.
2. AUDIO ENGINE: The AudioContext MUST be the source of truth. The visual layer is just a renderer for the audio state.
3. NO SCROLLING: The app is a single-screen experience (PWA). overflow-hidden on body.
4. ACCESSIBILITY: Even though it's audio-first, ensure screen readers can announce the Oracle's text.
5. SHADCN: Use Shadcn for the 'Settings' or 'Calibration' modals, but strip the default white backgrounds. Make them glass panels.
6. MICROPHONE: Handle permission denial gracefully. The game cannot function without it, so show a clear, diegetic 'Link Broken' message.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
